title: ranunculus brevidens
intro: Ranunculus brevidens, also known as narrow-flowered buttercup, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ranunculus brevidens include its potential to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and support the immune system. Ranunculus brevidens is typically prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, which can be used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and other ailments.
